caveat: Block/negotiated-market feed is ~1 session lagged with no historical archive — accumulating daily. The cross-market flag is EXPERIMENTAL (single-session, not yet backtested for false-positive rate); it hardens once ≥20 sessions are collected. Descriptive pattern only — never proof of manipulation.
